title: inga cayennensis
intro: Inga cayennensis, also known as the West Indian or Cayenne Inga, is a species of flowering plant in the family Mimosaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Inga cayennensis include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to support overall health and well-being.
